candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Exact reported total current assets label.

candidates.why: Balance-sheet cash balance; best match for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.why: Cash flow line, not a balance-sheet cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Effects of exchange rate changes on cash
candidates.why: Cash flow adjustment, not ending cash on the balance sheet.
Cash flow roll-forward item, not balance-sheet cash.
Semantically close, but target should come from the balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Chose the balance-sheet cash line rather than cash-flow roll-forward items.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Exact reported total current liabilities label.

candidates.why: Financing-related liability presented within current liabilities; good match for short-term debt.
Debt instrument presented in the current liabilities section in some years; relevant for current debt.
Could represent borrowings, but appears as a supplemental/detail line and overlaps with Loans payable, so less preferred to avoid double counting.
Current debt-like item but explicitly lease-related, which should be excluded from STD baseline.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Explicit lease maturity line; excluded from STD baseline.

variables.notes: Selected non-lease current debt labels. Excluded lease-related rows and excluded 'Revolving Line of Credit - Outstanding' to avoid potential double counting with 'Loans payable'.
No clear taxes payable/current tax liability row is present on the balance sheet preview.

candidates.why: Best apparent total PPE-type balance; broader and cleaner than individual asset components or lease-specific gross line.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-specific gross asset line, not total PPE and less preferred under baseline mapping.
PPE component rather than total PPE.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because 'Capital assets' is the clearest reported total PPE-style line; more appropriate than the lease-only gross asset candidate.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow used in operating activities
candidates.why: Direct operating cash flow total; standard equivalent of net cash from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow used in operating activities

variables.notes: Uses the reported operating cash flow total, even though phrased as 'used in' because it is negative in these years.
